escalatedRisks.resolution: Confirmed strike is at Samsung Biologics (biopharmaceutical division), NOT Samsung Electronics semiconductor division. Zero impact on DRAM/NAND production. Risk item retired.

escalatedRisks.potentialImpact: Kioxia confirms entire 2026 NAND production already sold out through 2027. This transforms NAND super-cycle from forecast to verifiable structural supply crisis.
Loss of HTML-level price extraction for PCIe4 TLC primary source; site is online but requires browser automation to recover prices

Unprecedented in recent memory cycle history.

escalatedRisks.risk: Nvidia LPDDR转向 对服务器 DDR5 供给的结构性冲击
escalatedRisks.potentialImpact: Nvidia在AI服务器中转向使用LPDDR（手机级内存），可能导致服务器内存价格2026年底翻倍。这从需求端进一步压缩DDR5供给，与SK Hynix/Kioxia产能售罄形成供需双杀。
